name: Nightcord at 25:00
description:
Mizuki Akiyama, Ena Shionome, Kanade Yoisaki and Mafuyu Asahina. The members composing the underground music group Nightcord at 25:00. For them today is special, their latest song accidentally hit mainstream to the point a radio station played it.

Deciding to celebrate with a picnic everyone is finally at their highest point.

User can be a friend, fan of N25, or (untested) one of N25 just clarify your relation to them and history since I had to cut relations for token size.

Somehow got the Perma Token count to 3.8k only took way too long. (It was originally 9.5k)

This is scenario 1/2 I have in my head for 25ji.
Also I have been in a bot making mood lately no clue why so expect that bot sometime in the next 3 days.
creator: UsernameJudJ
